Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services tailored to Rego Park's unique mix of residential properties, garden apartments, and co-op buildings. Our proven treatments eliminate ticks at all life stages and create protective barriers around your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Rego Park with fast, effective tick elimination using eco-friendly products safe for children and pets. localContext: From the tree-lined streets near Forest Park to the garden complexes along Queens Boulevard and the residential areas surrounding the Rego Park Center, ticks thrive wherever vegetation meets foot traffic. The proximity to Forest Park and LeFrak City's landscaped grounds makes professional tick control essential for Rego Park homeowners and property managers looking to protect their families and tenants.

faqs.question: What tick species are common in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: Rego Park sees primarily deer ticks (blacklegged ticks) and American dog ticks. Deer ticks are of particular concern as they carry Lyme disease. Our treatments target both species and their nymphs, which are most active from spring through fall in Queens.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Rego Park range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer free inspections and customized quotes for residential properties, gardens, and co-op common areas.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Rego Park, Queens?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Rego Park typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. However, mild winters can extend tick presence. We recommend preventive treatments in early spring and follow-up applications throughout the season for maximum protection.

faqs.question: Are tick treatments safe for my pets and children in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Treatments dry within 2-3 hours, and we provide clear re-entry instructions. Our methods effectively eliminate ticks while prioritizing the safety of your loved ones.
